creator: oberman@es.net
text:
When built with embedded mozilla, galeon ignores requests for secure
(https) web pages. No errors, No nothing. It simply seems to ignore
them. When built with full mozilla (a bit of a pain, especially if you
have no desire to have Mozilla on your system), it works fine. Applies
to Galeon V1.0.2 and V1.0.1 built with Mozilla 0.9.7,1 and 0.9.6,1,
respectively.

Fix: 

Work-around is to build with full Mozilla. No known fix at this time.
How-To-Repeat: Attempt to access any https protocol page.
